name: Feasting Tirade

abilities.name: Sanguine Slumber
abilities.text: After a friendly, unique, Returned model is killed, a model with this ability may drain a (t). If it does not, replace this crew card with Starving Tirade.

abilities.name: Feast on the Faithful
abilities.text: After a Hunger token is removed from this model, this model heals 2.

abilities.name: Blinded by Hunger
abilities.text: When this model declares the Walk or Charge action, it may gain a Hunger token to treat that action as a (t) action, ignoring the once per activation restriction.

extraction_notes: Faction is not specified on this crew card
The (t) symbol represents a skull suit icon
Hunger token is referenced but not defined on this card
